title: UDS Governance Receipt (DSSE-Wrapped)
description: A DSSE-wrapped (Dead Simple Signing Envelope, https://github.com/secure-systems-lab/dsse) governance receipt for a UDS span. The receipt attests to the span's provenance using an in-toto attestation predicate (https://github.com/in-toto/attestation) shaped per SLSA Provenance v1.0 (https://slsa.dev/spec/v1.0/provenance). Part of the 5-link SLSA attestation chain in extended-attestations.jsonl at uds-mesh commit 25a7e53.

receipt_id.description: Unique receipt identifier. Monotonically increasing per component for deterministic pairing with spans.

span_id.description: The span_id of the UDS span this receipt attests to. Foreign key into spans_sample.jsonl.

trace_id.description: The trace_id of the trace containing the attested span. Allows receipt-to-trace correlation without needing span data.

component.description: The UDS mesh component that issued this receipt.

dsse_envelope.description: The DSSE envelope (https://github.com/secure-systems-lab/dsse). Payload is an in-toto attestation statement (https://github.com/in-toto/attestation/blob/main/spec/README.md) with a SLSA Provenance v1.0 predicate (https://slsa.dev/spec/v1.0/provenance). Signatures in this dataset use HMAC-SHA-256 with a dev key (see slsa_dsse_substrate.py §1.5); production deployments should use Ed25519 via cosign.

payload.description: Base64-encoded in-toto attestation statement JSON. The PAE (Pre-Authentication Encoding) signing input is: 'DSSEv1 SP LEN(payloadType) SP payloadType SP LEN(payload_bytes) SP payload_bytes'.

payloadType.description: Media type of the payload. Must be 'application/vnd.in-toto+json' per the in-toto attestation spec (https://github.com/in-toto/attestation).

signatures.description: Array of signature objects per the DSSE envelope spec.

keyid.description: Key identifier, formatted as a DID URL (https://www.w3.org/TR/did-core/) for production or a short string for dev fixtures.

sig.description: Base64-encoded signature bytes over the PAE-encoded payload.

predicate_type.description: The in-toto predicate type URI. 'https://slsa.dev/provenance/v1' for SLSA Provenance v1.0 attestations.

subject_name.description: Human-readable subject of the attestation, typically '{component}:{span_id}'.

subject_sha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the canonical JSON serialization of the attested span. Binds the receipt to the span content per SLSA subject requirements (https://slsa.dev/spec/v1.0/provenance#schema).

builder_id.description: SLSA builder identifier (https://slsa.dev/spec/v1.0/provenance#builderid). Uses the SZL DID method: 'did:web:szlholdings.com:{component}'.

slsa_level_claimed.description: The SLSA level claimed by this receipt (https://slsa.dev/spec/v1.0/levels). Verified externally; this dataset does not include a verifier.

issued_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of receipt issuance.

mesh_commit.description: uds-mesh commit SHA at receipt issuance. Canonical: 25a7e53 (uds-v0.2.0).

chain_position.description: Position (1-indexed) of this receipt in the 5-link SLSA attestation chain in extended-attestations.jsonl. Null for standalone receipts not part of the chain.

synthetic.description: True for all records in v0.1.0. All receipts are synthetic fixtures; no live SLSA chain material is included.
